title: Senate Advances NO FAKES Act to Curb AI Deepfakes, Civil Liberties Concerns Persist
blurb: Lawmakers want to give you rights over your AI likeness—but free speech advocates warn of unintended censorship.

title: Anthropic's Mythos Export Ban Grows More Tangled Amid Security Disputes
blurb: Ninety minutes to comply, no explanation given—and security experts say the data behind the ban points the other way.

title: Google's Interactions API Hits General Availability as Primary Gemini Interface
blurb: Managed agents, remote sandboxes, and background tasks—what the new default Gemini interface means for developers building agentic workflows.
